title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions
company: Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions:
Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions!
